Market Intelligence Brief
Generated 09:34 ET
P/C divergence signals institutional dispersion trade ahead of CPI print
KEY TAKEAWAYS
  • 1. Index puts at 2.17 P/C vs single-name calls at 0.77 P/C reveals classic institutional hedging pattern into CPI.
  • 2. Positive dealer gamma at $1.1B creates volatility compression that could amplify any CPI surprise moves.
  • 3. Low implied correlation at 0.12 confirms dispersion opportunity with 19 names in backwardation pricing elevated event risk.
NARRATIVE — dispersion ahead of CPI

The most striking signal is the extreme P/C divergence — index puts trading 2.17x calls while single-name options favor calls at 0.77x puts, the widest spread in recent weeks. This classic institutional pattern shows sophisticated money buying index protection while maintaining bullish single-name exposure, particularly visible in massive QQQ put blocks totaling 327k contracts ahead of today's CPI. The flow suggests institutions expect market-wide volatility but believe stock-specific opportunities remain intact. Dealer positioning at $1.1B positive gamma creates a volatility suppression environment that amplifies the significance of today's 8:30am CPI print. With SPY trading just $1 above the gamma flip at $673.36, any meaningful CPI surprise could trigger rapid dealer re-hedging once gamma turns negative. The technical setup is particularly precarious given 19 names in backwardation — including AAPL, NVDA, and ARM — pricing elevated near-term risk that positive gamma is temporarily masking. The low 0.12 implied correlation reading validates the dispersion thesis embedded in the P/C split, with names like DASH trading 276% rich to sector while XOM sits 24% cheap. Millennium's aggressive Q4 reversals in AMZN (+398%) and NVDA (+93%) align with today's call-heavy single-name flow, suggesting institutional conviction persists despite index-level hedging.

Layer 1: P/C divergence 2.17/0.77Layer 2: GEX +$1.1BLayer 9: CPI 08:30 critical
QQQBEARISH
CPI hedge concentration
Massive 327k put block accumulation across Apr 17 582P and Apr 13 573P strikes ahead of 8:30am CPI print. Flow represents $19M notional in near-term downside protection, consistent with index P/C ratio hitting 2.17x — institutions hedging broad exposure while maintaining single-name conviction elsewhere.

NVDABULLISH
Millennium conviction flow
90k Apr 10 185C block aligns with Millennium's aggressive Q4 position build (+93%) and transition from puts to calls overlay. Strike represents 6% OTM bet on continued AI momentum, trading into backwardation that prices 19% elevated near-term vol vs forward curve. Technical golden cross in AMD (+81.5 score) supports broader semi strength.

SPYVOL PLAY
Gamma flip catalyst setup
Massive 151k May 15 530P and 116k Apr 9 675P blocks bracket current $674 level around gamma flip at $673.36. Flow represents institutional tail hedging into CPI with $1.1B positive dealer gamma creating compression that could amplify any surprise move. Put wall at $670 creates technical support, but negative gamma below flip changes dealer behavior entirely.
